commit.message:
Support Doctrine ODM vector store (#443)

* Require dev and suggest doctrine/mongodb-odm

To support Doctrine's ODM

* Add support for Doctrine ODM

Similar to the Doctrine ORM vector store, but works with the ODM (for
MongoDB)

* Add vector search example for Doctrine ODM

Creates an example Symfony app showcasing vector search with MongoDB
Atlas and the `DoctrineODMVectorStore`

* Update src/Embeddings/VectorStores/Doctrine/ODM/DoctrineODMVectorStore.php

---------

Co-authored-by: Franco Lombardo <f.lombardo69@gmail.com>

commit.message:
ModelsLabImage provider for text-to-image generation (#450)

* feat: Add ModelsLabImage provider for text-to-image generation

Adds LLPhant\Image\ModelsLabImage implementing ImageInterface,
enabling text-to-image generation via the ModelsLab REST API.

ModelsLab supports Flux, SDXL, Stable Diffusion, and 10,000+
community fine-tuned models.

Usage:
    $image = new ModelsLabImage(); // reads MODELSLAB_API_KEY from env
    $image->model = 'flux';        // or sdxl, realistic-vision-v6, etc.
    $result = $image->generateImage('A sunset over mountains');
    echo $result->url;

Configuration via properties:
    model, width, height, numInferenceSteps, guidanceScale,
    negativePrompt, seed

API docs: https://docs.modelslab.com/image-generation/overview

* fix: correct Guzzle base_uri + endpoint path (fixes 404)

Guzzle resolves relative paths against base_uri per RFC 3986.
When ENDPOINT_TEXT2IMG started with '/', it replaced the full
path, resulting in 'https://modelslab.com/images/text2img' (404)
instead of 'https://modelslab.com/api/v6/images/text2img'.

Fix: add trailing slash to API_BASE_URL and remove leading slash
from ENDPOINT_TEXT2IMG so Guzzle appends correctly.

* style: apply linting fixes and add integration test per maintainer feedback

- Remove alignment padding from array literals in generateImage() (PSR standard)
- Add JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR flag to json_decode() for proper error handling
- Add MODELSLAB_API_KEY to docker/.env.dist environment template
- Add MODELSLAB_API_KEY to docker/docker-compose.yml service environment
- Add tests/Integration/Image/ModelsLabImageTest.php integration test

Addresses feedback from @f-lombardo in PR #450.

* docs: add ModelsLabImage usage section to README

Add documentation for ModelsLabImage under the 'Generating images'
section, showing environment variable setup, constructor options,
model/dimension configuration, and usage example.

Requested by @f-lombardo in PR review.

---------

Co-authored-by: adhikjoshi <adhik@modelslab.com>

verification.payload:
tree e26a89b13d64974d3e544b6cce43167c0da8b580
parent d4d8de5efabe8eddb5f864fa718c71e5f3c7ca14
author Adhik Joshi <adhik3035@gmail.com> 1771755359 +0530
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1771755359 +0100

commit.message: Fix getEmbeddingLength in OllamaEmbeddingGenerator.php
Add options to Ollama embedding generator
feat(ollama) : Add modelOptions to embed api
Add integration tests and change error message

fix(OpenAI): handle HTTP errors to prevent response parsing failures

Problem:

The OpenAI client library was attempting to parse HTTP error responses as
successful completions, causing fatal parsing errors when using OpenAI-compatible
APIs (e.g., Gemini, Mistral) with invalid API tokens or model names.

Fix:

Added Guzzle middleware to throw HttpException for non-2xx HTTP responses
before the OpenAI client attempts parsing, ensuring clear error messages
instead of cryptic array access failures.

Reproduction:

```php
include_once __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';
$config = new MistralAIConfig();
$config->apiKey = 'fake key';
$chat = new MistralAIChat($config);
$chat->generateText('Hello!');
```

Before fix:

```console
PHP Warning:  Undefined array key "choices" ...
PHP Fatal error:  Uncaught TypeError: array_map(): Argument #2 ($array) must be of type array, null given ...
```

After fix:

```console
PHP Fatal error:  Uncaught LLPhant\Exception\HttpException:
HTTP error from OpenAI (401): {"detail":"Unauthorized"}
```

Signed-off-by: Ihor Aleksandrychiev <ihor.aleksandrychiev@northern.tech>

Fix WebPageTextGetter (#416)

See https://stackoverflow.com/questions/10289180/http-1-0-403-forbidden-error-message-when-using-wikipedia-api

releases.body:
## What's Changed
* .gitattributes file to reduce deployment size when required through packagist by @TomHAnderson in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/455
* Add support for PHP 8.5 - Remove rector and related checks by @f-lombardo in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/462


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/compare/0.11.14...0.11.15

## What's Changed
* Support Doctrine ODM vector store by @paulinevos in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/443
* Add .readtedocs.yaml by @f-lombardo in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/452
* Add .readtedocs.yaml - fix file name by @f-lombardo in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/453
* Docs to RST for readthedocs.org by @TomHAnderson in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/454
* Minor fixes and improvements to README by @f-lombardo in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/458

## New Contributors
* @TomHAnderson made their first contribution in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/454

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/compare/0.11.13...0.11.14

## What's Changed
* feat: Add ModelsLabImage provider for text-to-image generation by @adhikjoshi in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/450

## New Contributors
* @adhikjoshi made their first contribution in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/450

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/compare/0.11.12...0.11.13

## What's Changed
* Minor updates in configuration - 2 by @f-lombardo in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/445
* Add conditional return for `QuestionAnswering::answerQuestionFromChat()` by @marcreichel in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/444

## New Contributors
* @marcreichel made their first contribution in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/444

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/compare/0.11.11...0.11.12

## What's Changed
* Add LMStudio integration by @f-lombardo and @ClicShopping in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/438
* Minor updates in configuration by @f-lombardo in https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/pull/440


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LLPhant/LLPhant/compare/0.11.10...0.11.11

readme_html:
LLPhant - A comprehensive PHP Generative AI Framework

We designed this framework to be as simple as possible, while still providing you with the tools you need to build powerful apps. It is compatible with Symfony and Laravel.

We are working to expand the support of different LLMs. Right now, we are supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Ollama, LM Studio and services compatible with the OpenAI API such as LocalAI. Ollama that can be used to run LLM locally such as Llama 2.

We want to thank few amazing projects that we use here or inspired us:

  • the learnings from using LangChain and LLamaIndex
  • the excellent work from the OpenAI PHP SDK.

We can find great external resource on LLPhant (ping us to add yours):

  • 🇫🇷 Construire un RAG en PHP avec la doc de Symfony, LLPhant et OpenAI : Tutoriel Complet
  • 🇫🇷 Retour d'expérience sur la création d'un agent autonome
  • 🇬🇧 Exploring AI riding an LLPhant
  • 🇬🇧 Evaluating LLM and AI agents Outputs with String Comparison, Criteria & Trajectory Approaches

Get Started

Note
Requires PHP 8.1+

First, install LLPhant via the Composer package manager:

composer require theodo-group/llphant

In case you have not installed the GD extension, and you do not want to add it to your PHP setup, you can use the --ignore-platform-req=ext-gd option

composer require theodo-group/llphant --ignore-platform-req=ext-gd

If you want to try the latest features of this library, you can use:

composer require theodo-group/llphant:dev-main

You may also want to check the requirements for OpenAI PHP SDK as it is the main client.

Documentation

Find documentation in the docs directory or online at https://llphant.readthedocs.org

Contributing

See CONTRIBUTING for details.

Contributors

Thanks to our contributors:

Sponsor
